title: Djenergy
compiled_truth: Djenergy is an external contact at [Dowjones](companies/dowjones). Over the corpus period (2000-11-08 to 2001-10-29), Djenergy sent 31 and received 22 emails, totalling 53 interactions. Top correspondents: [Ernest Onukogu](people/ernest-onukogu-dowjones) (17), [Kate Symes](people/kate-symes) (7), [George Kogut](people/george-kogut-dowjones) (5), [Gunther Pergher](people/gunther-pergher-dowjones) (5), [Onukogu](people/onukogu) (2).
